title: Trimble and General Motors Mark Historic Milestone: More Than 34 Million Hands-Free Miles on the Road
text: Trimble Autonomy and GM are Delivering an Enhanced Driving Experience WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- General Motors and Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) recently reached a significant milestone in the hands-free driving world—more than 34 million miles driven with Super Cruise™* engaged on General Motors vehicles.

title: Trimble Introduces Horizontal Steering Control, Automatic Screed Width Control for Vögele Asphalt Pavers
text: Trimble Roadworks 2.10 Marks Important Step in Trimble's Path Toward Autonomy WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today the Trimble® Roadworks Paving Control Platform version 2.10 with Horizontal Steering Control for Vögele Navitronic asphalt pavers.

title: Junttan Oy to Offer Trimble Groundworks Machine Control for Piling Machines from the Factory
text: Piling Operations are Now More Efficient and Safer with Stakeless Workflows and 3D Machine Control for Junttan Piling Machines WESTMINSTER, Colo. and KUOPIO, Finland , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and Junttan Oy announced today the availability of Trimble® Groundworks Machine Control System for Piling Machines as a factory option on Junttan Oy foundation machines.

title: Trimble and ABI GmbH Offer Trimble Ready Option for Piling and Drilling Machines
text: WESTMINSTER, Colo., and NIEDERNBERG, Germany , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) and ABI Maschinenfabrik und Vertriebsgesellschaft mbH announced today the introduction of a Trimble Ready® factory option for new ABI MOBILRAM-Systems and DELMAG Drill Rigs.

title: Trimble: Do Not Average Down, Hold Still And Be Patient
text: Trimble is profitable but its stock is a falling knife. Do not average down at the moment. Let others push the stock to more affordable ratios.

title: Trimble Observes World Food Day with $100,000 Donation to World Food Program USA
text: Donation will Offer Food Assistance as Humanitarian Crises Continue to Unfold Across the Globe, Leaving Populations Stranded and Hungry WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Oct. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that it will donate $100,000 to World Food Program USA to support relief efforts as humanitarian crises across the globe continue to unfold, leaving entire populations hungry.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Bolsters Agriculture Efforts With New Displays
text: Trimble (TRMB) unveils agriculture displays for precision-specific applications, namely GFX-1060 and GFX-1260.

title: Trimble Changes Headquarters to Westminster, Colorado
text: Sunnyvale Campus Named Silicon Valley Center for Innovation and Operations WESTMINSTER, Colo. , Oct. 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that the company has changed its headquarters from Sunnyvale, California to Westminster, Colorado.

title: Trimble Announces Tekla Global BIM Awards 2022 Winners
text: T2 Alliance Wins Best BIM Project for Complex Airport Expansion Project SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ; TRMB) announced today the winners of its 2022 Tekla® Global Building Information Modeling (BIM) Awards.

title: Trimble's New Agriculture Displays Provide Next-Generation Performance and Connectivity for In-Field Operations
text: Powerful to Run and Simple to Use SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) introduced today its next-generation displays for precision agriculture applications—the Trimble® GFX-1060™ and GFX-1260™ displays.
